items.prompt: Did you finish the assignment last night?
items.prompt_task_text: Did you finish the assignment last night?
items.answer: I stayed in the library until midnight.

items.prompt: I forgot to grab the syllabus from the office. Can you help me out?
items.prompt_task_text: I forgot to grab the syllabus from the office. Can you help me out?
items.answer: Can I borrow yours for the weekend?

items.prompt: Are you going to the gym today?
items.prompt_task_text: Are you going to the gym today?
items.answer: Yes, I plan to run after class.

items.prompt: Where did your roommate go this afternoon?
items.prompt_task_text: Where did your roommate go this afternoon?
items.answer: She studies at the coffee shop nearby.

items.prompt: What did your tutor mention about the group project?
items.prompt_task_text: What did your tutor mention about the group project?
items.answer: He suggested that we meet every Wednesday afternoon.

items.prompt: Where did you leave your bike yesterday morning?
items.prompt_task_text: Where did you leave your bike yesterday morning?
items.answer: I parked my bike behind the science building this morning.

items.prompt: Have you spoken with your advisor this week?
items.prompt_task_text: Have you spoken with your advisor this week?
items.answer: I haven't found a free slot on her calendar.

items.prompt: Why did Margot skip our study session last evening?
items.prompt_task_text: Why did Margot skip our study session last evening?
items.answer: Margot stayed home because her younger sister was sick.

items.prompt: What did Professor Cho ask you about your essay?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Professor Cho ask you about your essay?
items.answer: She wondered whether I had cited the original source.

items.prompt: Did you hear about the new gym schedule?
items.prompt_task_text: Did you hear about the new gym schedule?
items.answer: The fitness center now opens earlier on weekend mornings.

items.prompt: Tell me how your registration went this morning.
items.prompt_task_text: Tell me how your registration went this morning.
items.answer: It's already closed for the seminar Lucia recommended.

items.prompt: What did Julian tell you about the deadline change?
items.prompt_task_text: What did Julian tell you about the deadline change?
items.answer: The deadline has been pushed to next Friday afternoon.

items.prompt: What did the lecturer mention about tomorrow's chemistry quiz?
items.prompt_task_text: What did the lecturer mention about tomorrow's chemistry quiz?
items.answer: The lecturer asked if you'd reviewed the practice problems.

items.prompt: Have you noticed anything strange about the dorm lounge?
items.prompt_task_text: Have you noticed anything strange about the dorm lounge?
items.answer: The vending machine no longer accepts our meal cards.

items.prompt: What did your friend say about joining the debate club?
items.prompt_task_text: What did your friend say about joining the debate club?
items.answer: A friend told me when they're meeting this Thursday.

items.prompt: Where does the shuttle stop after the engineering building?
items.prompt_task_text: Where does the shuttle stop after the engineering building?
items.answer: Does it also stop near the music building?

items.prompt: Tell me about the book you ordered last week.
items.prompt_task_text: Tell me about the book you ordered last week.
items.answer: When did the package that the bookstore shipped finally arrive at your dorm?

items.prompt: Where did you hear about the new tutoring service?
items.prompt_task_text: Where did you hear about the new tutoring service?
items.answer: The flyer that I saw was posted near the cafeteria entrance.

items.prompt: What did the tech crew say about your laptop battery?
items.prompt_task_text: What did the tech crew say about your laptop battery?
items.answer: The tech crew haven't billed me for the unexpected repair yet.

items.prompt: What did your dorm advisor tell you about quiet hours?
items.prompt_task_text: What did your dorm advisor tell you about quiet hours?
items.answer: She explained why the quiet hours had been extended on weekdays.
